content:
Hello, this is my first line
This is line #2
Line 3
I gotta go
See you later bro
name: TestDialogue

content:
...Hey, are you alright? You just passed out right here a while ago...
I tried to wake you up, but you wouldn't move... I really thought you were a goner! Be careful, please...
After all, you don't have much left.
name: FirstGuy

content:
Still human? it's futile.
We will be the only ones left.
You should become one of us. If you value your existence.
I heard there's still a working facility.
Honestly, a miracle it survived.
name: WanderingGuy

content:
How much longer will this city stand? I am worried...
The structural damage must be enormous. It's only a matter of time until everything collapses.
But where can we even go? There is no safe place. Perhaps if we leave?
...Oh, but it would take weeks to leave on foot...
name: Street1
